description: CBT-Bench fine-grained core belief classification (19-class, top-1 hit)

topConfusion.pair: I am helpless -> I am powerless, weak, vulnerable
I am a victim -> I am unlovable
I am a victim -> I am powerless, weak, vulnerable
I am incompetent -> I am worthless, waste
I am powerless, weak, vulnerable -> I am helpless
I am powerless, weak, vulnerable -> I am out of control
I am incompetent -> I am defective
I am helpless -> I am defective
I am helpless -> I am a victim
I am powerless, weak, vulnerable -> I am bound to be abandoned

comparisons.value: 多标签金标 → 采用 top-1 命中率；论文 Table 报告微调/零样本模型的 multi-label F1，口径不同，跑分后如需对表可加严格集合匹配
